only subjected to fine and not imprisonment, we are inclined to modify 
the sentence to only payment of a fine restricted to Rs.32,00,000/- 
(Rupees Thirty-Two Lakhs). Acceding to the request by the learned 
senior counsel, such fine be paid within four months from today to 
the appellant, failing which the sentence in entirety, as awarded by 
the Trial Court and upheld by the Appellate Court, will stand restored, 
with the added modification that the entire fine of Rs.35,00,000/- 
(Rupees Thirty-Five Lakhs) will be payable to the appellant. 
25. Parties are left to bear their own costs. I.A. No.99358/2024 (exemption 
from filing Official Translation) is allowed. I.A. No.234705/2024 (to 
file additional documents) is allowed; Annexure A-1 (Application/
Tehrir) is taken on record.
Result of the case: Appeal allowed.
